rationale: Review 1's casing inconsistency (snake_case fields unipotent_radical_trivial/radical_trivial vs. camelCase finiteType/geomReduced and mixed lemma name) is a real, diff-grounded naming error inside the new classes that a maintainer would insist be fixed for internal consistency; Review 2 misses this, focuses instead on Is- prefixes (plausible but not required by the diff) + AlgPoints (unused, roadmap not shown), and thus leaves a visible inconsistency unaddressed while both agree on the vacuous lemma.
